_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.

_contextSnippet: Overall, spheroids were found in 22% of Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice compared to 4% of Nf2+/− mice and 0% of WT mice
details: 22% of Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice developed tumor spheroids in ascites compared to 4% of Nf2+/− mice and 0% of WT mice
